title: Mapped CRM vs Traditional CRM
excerpt: Why geolocated lead management changes field sales.
content: A mapped CRM puts every lead on a map so reps can plan visits, assign territories, and act without switching tools. AM2 combines discovery, enrichment, and map-based pipeline in one workspace.

title: How AI Review Analysis Finds Sales Opportunities
excerpt: Turn customer reviews into actionable pain points before outreach.
content: Smart Reviews summarize ratings, complaints, and strengths so your team knows what to say on the first call. Pair insights with Smart Emails for personalized outreach at scale.

title: Prospecting with Location Data
excerpt: Search by industry and geography to build qualified lists fast.
content: AM2 Finder lets you filter businesses by country, region, city, or custom map areas. Import results directly into your mapped CRM to start outreach immediately.
